name: playup-padel
description: PlayUp Padel mobile wrapper for App Store and Google Play builds.

scripts.cap:add:android: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:add:ios: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap add ios
scripts.cap:sync: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap sync
scripts.android:open: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.ios:open: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:aab: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
